summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Custom Theme Builder feature in Chart Studio. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully verified - Theme Builder dialog opens correctly, theme name input works, color pickers (5-8 colors) function properly, live preview shows gradients, Add Color button expands palette, Save Theme creates themes with success toast, MY THEMES section displays with edit/delete on hover, and themes can be applied to charts.

backend: GET /api/themes/presets - themes have id, name, colors (5+ colors each)
GET /api/themes/presets - includes violet, ocean, sunset, forest, rose, midnight, corporate, warm, cool, neon
GET /api/themes/custom - returns 200 with themes array, count, limit, can_create_more
GET /api/themes/custom - Pro tier shows limit of 10
POST /api/themes/custom - returns 200 and creates theme with id, name, colors
Full CRUD workflow: Create -> Read -> Update -> Delete works correctly
frontend: Chart Studio - 'Create Theme' button visible in Style Options section
Theme Builder dialog opens when clicking Create Theme button
Theme Builder - Title 'Create Custom Theme' with description shown
Theme Builder - Theme Name input field works and accepts text
Theme Builder - Color Palette section shows 5 color pickers by default (5/8)
Theme Builder - 'Add Color' button adds new color slot (tested 6/8)
Theme Builder - Color pickers display hex values (#8b5cf6, etc.)
Theme Builder - Preview section shows gradient of selected colors
Theme Builder - Shows theme usage count (3/10 themes used for Pro tier)
Theme Builder - Save Theme button creates new theme successfully
Theme Builder - Toast 'Theme created successfully!' appears after save
Chart Studio - BUILT-IN themes section (6 themes) visible
Chart Studio - PROFESSIONAL themes section (6 themes) visible
Chart Studio - MY THEMES section appears with crown icon and count (4/10)
Chart Studio - Custom theme circles are clickable
Chart Studio - Toast 'Applied [theme name] theme' appears when clicking custom theme
Chart Studio - Selected theme shows white ring/highlight
Chart Studio - Edit button (blue paintbrush) appears on hover over custom theme
Chart Studio - Delete button (red X) appears on hover over custom theme

seed_data_created: Created 'Ocean Sunset' theme for testing (cleaned up test themes after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom Theme Builder feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: GET /api/themes/presets (10 preset themes), GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/themes/custom (CRUD for user's custom themes). Tier limits: Free=3 themes, Pro=10 themes, Enterprise=unlimited. Frontend Theme Builder dialog accessible via 'Create Theme' button in Chart Studio Style Options section. MY THEMES section shows user's custom themes with edit/delete on hover. Test user has 3 custom themes (Ocean Sunset, Five Color Theme, Eight Color Theme).

details.location: Chart Studio > Style Options > Color Theme section

details.title: Create Custom Theme
details.description: Design your own color palette for charts
